tr.td: Doubly linked list maintains direct tail pointer.
Hash map key deletion is average case constant.
Constant time pointer swap at head.
Algorithm avoids iterating through the cache.

div.p: ENGINEERING NOTE: The combination of a HashMap (for O(1) lookup) and a Doubly Linked List (for O(1) reordering/removal) allows the cache to scale to millions of entries without performance degradation during eviction.

ul.li: 3 entries in LRU order (a, b, c)

ol.li: Tail always points to Least Recently Used
